channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-3361] replay-single test_65a: @@@@@@ FAIL: No early reply
item.description:
== replay-single test 65a: AT: verify early replies == 11:40:05 (1369075205)
CMD: mds03 lctl get_param -n at_max
CMD: c08 lctl get_param -n at_max
CMD: oss02 lctl get_param -n at_max
CMD: mds03 lctl get_param -n at_max
CMD: c08 lctl get_param -n at_max
CMD: oss02 lctl get_param -n at_max
CMD: mds03 lctl get_param -n at_history
CMD: mds03 lctl set_param at_history=8
at_history=8
CMD: oss02 lctl set_param at_history=8
at_history=8
debug=other
CMD: mds03 lctl set_param fail_val=6000
fail_val=6000
CMD: mds03 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param fail_loc=0x8000050a
fail_loc=0x8000050a
replay-single test_65a: @@@@@@ FAIL: No early reply
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4186:error_noexit()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4213:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/replay-single.sh:1648:test_65a()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4452:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4485:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4307:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/replay-single.sh:1655:main()
Dumping lctl log to /scratch/tmp/minh/logs//2013-05-20/113947/replay-single.test_65a.*.1369075235.log
CMD: c07,c08,c09,c10,c11,c12,c13,c14,c15,c18,c19,c20,c21,c22,c23,c24,mds03,oss02 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /scratch/tmp/minh/logs//2013-05-20/113947/replay-single.test_65a.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1369075235.log;
dmesg > /scratch/tmp/minh/logs//2013-05-20/113947/replay-single.test_65a.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1369075235.log
CMD: c07,c08,c09,c10,c11,c12,c13,c14,c15,c18,c19,c20,c21,c22,c23,c24,mds03,oss02 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param debug=\"super ioctl neterror warning dlmtrace error emerg ha rpctrace vfstrace config console\";
debug=super ioctl neterror warning dlmtrace error emerg ha rpctrace vfstrace config console
debug=super ioctl neterror warning dlmtrace error emerg ha rpctrace vfstrace config console

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
